summary: V3 Remediation COMPLETE. Gate passes 10/10 with exit code 0. All 7 phases verified: Phase 0 (deal_state_machine.py deleted, Zod .passthrough() present), Phase 1 (no sys.path hack in executor), Phase 2 (capabilities/metrics and archive endpoints exist), Phase 3 (create_deal agent tool exists), Phase 4 (email ingestion references quarantine), Phase 5 (RETENTION_POLICY.md exists with comprehensive 136-line policy), Phase 6 (all legacy files deleted, CHANGES.md entry documents the decommission). Builder's cycle 1 verification confirms the remediation work completed in prior cycles is still in place and functional.

minors.title: Builder report contains factual inaccuracy about gate_attempts.json existence
minors.details: Builder report stated 'The gate_attempts.json file referenced in QA report DOES NOT EXIST and never did' but ls -la confirms the file exists at artifacts/gate_attempts.json (4295 bytes). This is a documentation error but does not affect gate results since the gate itself passes. The file contains the gate command and shows attempts=1, exit_code=0.
minors.expected: Builder claims file does not exist
minors.actual: File exists and contains valid gate attempt data
minors.recommended_fix: No action needed - this is just a documentation inaccuracy in the Builder report that does not affect the gate outcome
validation_steps: Verify gate passes independently of this claim
